package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_caching_per_request_config_cache_rebuild: Layer: Caching. Flag request-scoped caches rebuilt from config or environment on every call.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule512PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario512Positive(records []Rule512PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
